title: Review: Flutter/Android foreground service + auth hardening
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Package name is the hard lock-in issue (P1). The START_STICKY null intent bug means the keepalive degrades silently after OS kill. No security surface issues in this diff; crypto path unchanged.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) cannot run the Android service code locally to verify START_STICKY restart behavior; (2) did not trace the full JMAP response serialization path to verify the Space/join fix produces correct wire format; (3) Flutter widget lifecycle interactions (mounted checks) are correct-looking but not exercised by any tests. Would raise confidence if: Android integration test covering service kill/restart; wire-level test for Space/join error response format.
